tasks.label: 打包安装程序
tasks.command: npm run build; npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never

tasks.label: Patch blockmap
打包安装程序
tasks.command: npm run build; npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never

tasks.label: Patch blockmap v2
tasks.command: [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText((Join-Path $PWD 'node_modules\app-builder-lib\out\targets\blockmap\blockmap.js'), '"use strict";' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'exports.buildBlockMap = buildBlockMap;' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'async function buildBlockMap() { return null; }')

tasks.label: Patch blockmap v3
Kill Electron Processes
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name electron,SupplyChainTester -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules/electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm install electron@34.0.0

tasks.label: 完全重装
tasks.command: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm install 2>&1

tasks.label: 强制重装
tasks.command: cmd /c "rmdir /s /q node_modules 2>nul & del package-lock.json 2>nul & npm install"

tasks.label: 强制重装2
tasks.command: cmd /c 'rmdir /s /q node_modules && del package-lock.json && npm install'

tasks.label: Install Python deps
tasks.command: Write-Host "Python found at:"; & "D:\Python\python.exe" --version; Write-Host "Installing packages..."; & "D:\Python\python.exe" -m pip install requests openpyxl -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet; Write-Host "Done"

tasks.label: Download Python portable
tasks.command: Write-Host "Trying npmmirror..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://registry.npmmirror.com/-/binary/python/3.11.9/python-3.11.9-embed-amd64.zip" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\python-embed.zip" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; if ($?) { Write-Host "Download OK"; Expand-Archive -Path "$env:TEMP\python-embed.zip" -DestinationPath resources\python-portable -Force; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\python-embed.zip" -Force; Write-Host "Extracted"; Get-ChildItem resources\python-portable\python.exe | Select-Object Name,Length } else { Write-Host "FAILED" }

tasks.label: Configure pip + deps
tasks.command: $pth = "resources\python-portable\python311._pth"; (Get-Content $pth) -replace '#import site', 'import site' | Set-Content $pth; Write-Host "site-packages enabled"; $getpip = "$env:TEMP\get-pip.py"; Write-Host "Downloading get-pip.py..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py" -OutFile $getpip -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Installing pip..."; & resources\python-portable\python.exe $getpip --no-warn-script-location; Remove-Item $getpip -Force; Write-Host "Installing requests, openpyxl..."; & resources\python-portable\python.exe -m pip install requests openpyxl -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet; Write-Host "All done!"

tasks.label: Install Python packages
tasks.command: $py = Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\python.exe'; & $py -m pip install requests openpyxl -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet; Write-Host 'Packages installed successfully'

tasks.label: Git commit all
tasks.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: 全面升级 - 动态脚本扫描、自动更新、页面动画、Python便携版

- 新增 scripts/ 目录动态扫描，产品线自动发现子产品和脚本
- 侧边栏动态子菜单 + 刷新按钮（重置折叠+重新扫描）
- 变量解析支持多脚本合并（非仅第一个 .py 文件）
- ProductPage 动态数据优先，回退硬编码
- 新增 selectedSubProduct store 字段支持动态子产品路由
- 新增 navKey + navigateTo 实现页面切换动画
- 脚本执行页新增返回按钮（回到对应子产品页）
- 修复页面切换空白问题（移除残留 navigate prop）
- 响应区 Postman 风格重构（Body/Headers/Cookies/Request 标签）
- 主进程新增 auto-updater 模块 + IPC 通道
- 侧边栏集成 UpdateChecker 组件
- 修复脚本路径 cwd 回退层级错误（../../.. → ../..）
- scanScripts 使用 Buffer 编码避免中文路径问题
- 构建补丁 patch-blockmap.mjs + postinstall 自动执行
- npmrc 镜像加速 + setup-python 华为云镜像"

tasks.label: Git commit
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m "feat: dynamic scripts, auto-updater, page animations, python portable, API debugger upgrade"

tasks.label: Git commit
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m 'feat: dynamic scripts scan, auto-updater, page animations, python portable, API debugger upgrade'

tasks.label: Git commit
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m 'feat: dynamic scripts scan auto-updater page animations python portable API debugger upgrade'

tasks.label: Kill zombie Electron
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Zombies cleaned'

tasks.label: Kill all + restart
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name electron,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; netstat -ano | findstr :5173; npm run dev

tasks.label: Kill + restart
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name electron,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; npm run dev

tasks.label: Clean restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 2; npm run dev

tasks.label: Kill + restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; npm run dev

tasks.label: Install pandas
tasks.command: $py = Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $py) { & $py -m pip install pandas openpyxl -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet } else { & 'D:\Python\python.exe' -m pip install pandas openpyxl -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet }; Write-Host 'Done'

tasks.label: Install pandas system
tasks.command: & 'D:\Python\python.exe' -m pip install pandas -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet; Write-Host 'pandas installed'

tasks.label: Fix pip + install pandas
tasks.command: $pth = 'resources\python-portable\python311._pth'; Get-Content $pth; Write-Host '---'; (Get-Content $pth) -replace '#import site', 'import site' | Set-Content $pth; $py = (Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\python.exe'); & $py (Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\Scripts\pip.exe') install pandas -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet; Write-Host 'Done'

tasks.label: Test script
tasks.command: $py = (Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\python.exe'); $script = 'scripts\货e融\测试专用\测试专用2.py'; & $py -u -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'$($PWD)\scripts'); exec(open(r'$($PWD)\$script', encoding='utf-8').read())"

tasks.label: Test direct
tasks.command: $py = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\python.exe')); $scriptsDir = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $PWD 'scripts')); $file = Get-ChildItem $scriptsDir -Recurse -Filter '测试专用2.py' | Where-Object { $_.Directory.Name -eq '测试专用' -and -not $_.Name.Contains('副本') } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if ($file) { Write-Host "File: $file"; & $py -u $file } else { Write-Host 'Not found' }

tasks.label: Test app-style run
tasks.command: $py = [IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $PWD 'resources\python-portable\python.exe')); $scriptsDir = [IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $PWD 'scripts')); $file = [IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $PWD 'scripts\货e融\测试专用\测试专用2.py')); $code = "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'$scriptsDir'); exec(open(r'$file', encoding='utf-8').read())"; & $py -u -c $code

tasks.label: Test with ASCII path
tasks.command: $py = (Resolve-Path 'resources\python-portable\python.exe').Path; $scriptsDir = (Resolve-Path 'scripts').Path; $file = Get-ChildItem $scriptsDir -Recurse -Filter '*.py' | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'timer_output.py' } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Host "File: $file"; $code = 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r''' + $scriptsDir + '''); exec(open(r''' + $file + ''', encoding=''utf-8'').read())'; & $py -u -c $code

tasks.label: Test with real script
tasks.command: $py = (Resolve-Path 'resources\python-portable\python.exe').Path; $scriptsDir = (Resolve-Path 'scripts').Path; $file = Get-ChildItem $scriptsDir -Recurse -Filter '测试专用2.py' | Where-Object { -not $_.FullName.Contains('副本') } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Host "File: $file"; $code = 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r''' + $scriptsDir + '''); exec(open(r''' + $file + ''', encoding=''utf-8'').read())'; & $py -u -c $code

tasks.label: Final test
tasks.command: $py = (Resolve-Path 'resources\python-portable\python.exe').Path; $scriptsDir = (Resolve-Path 'scripts').Path; $file = Get-ChildItem $scriptsDir -Recurse -Filter '测试专用2.py' | Where-Object { -not $_.FullName.Contains('副本') } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; $code = 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r''' + $scriptsDir + '''); exec(open(r''' + $file + ''', encoding=''utf-8'').read())'; & $py -u -c $code

tasks.label: Test with fixed init
tasks.command: $py = (Resolve-Path 'resources\python-portable\python.exe').Path; $scriptsDir = (Resolve-Path 'scripts').Path; $file = Get-ChildItem $scriptsDir -Recurse -Filter '*.py' | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq '测试专用2.py' -and -not $_.FullName.Contains('副本') } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Host "File: $file"; $code = 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r''' + $scriptsDir + '''); exec(open(r''' + $file + ''', encoding=''utf-8'').read())'; & $py -u -c $code

tasks.label: Kill + restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; npm run dev

tasks.label: Test env SIT
tasks.command: $py = (Resolve-Path 'resources\python-portable\python.exe').Path; $scriptsDir = (Resolve-Path 'scripts').Path; $file = Get-ChildItem $scriptsDir -Recurse -Filter '测试专用2.py' | Where-Object { -not $_.FullName.Contains('副本') } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; $vars = 'current_env = "SIT"'; $preamble = "import sys`nsys.path.insert(0, r'$scriptsDir')`n$vars`nexec(open(r'$file', encoding='utf-8').read())"; & $py -u -c $preamble

tasks.label: Force rebuild + restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 2; npx electron-vite build 2>&1; Start-Sleep 1; npm run dev

tasks.label: Rebuild + restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; npx electron-vite build; npm run dev

tasks.label: Rebuild + restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; npx electron-vite build; npm run dev

tasks.label: Force rebuild
tasks.command: Remove-Item out -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npx electron-vite build; Write-Host '=== Checking output ==='; Select-String -Path out\main\index.js -Pattern 'splice|argvLine' | Select-Object -First 5

tasks.label: Remove BOM
tasks.command: $f = 'scripts\货e融\测试专用\timer_output.py'; $c = [IO.File]::ReadAllText((Resolve-Path $f), [Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $utf8nobom = New-Object Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [IO.File]::WriteAllText((Resolve-Path $f), $c, $utf8nobom); Write-Host 'BOM removed'

tasks.label: Rebuild + restart
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null; npx electron-vite build; npm run dev

tasks.label: Install playwright
tasks.command: $py = (Resolve-Path 'resources\python-portable\python.exe').Path; & $py -m pip install playwright -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple --quiet; Write-Host 'playwright installed'

tasks.label: Git push
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m "chore: add GitHub Actions CI, fix installer config, update deps"; git push
